text: This is the best day of my life
I am smiling a lot today
I am feeling low and depressed
This is a bad and sad day
I am scared about the future
There is too much pressure on me
I feel sick looking at this
My heart is full of love
You mean a lot to me
I am grateful for your support
I am blessed to have you
I am proud of my achievements
This is a moment of pride
I am hopeful for the future
I believe things will get better
There is light at the end of the tunnel
I am optimistic about what’s to come
I am at ease with myself
I am in a state of serenity
